dj_text: Signal locked. That Pirate Bot DJ Radio is online. Resistance is optional. YES! Castle of glass (Medieval kind of version)! And we're not stopping! No time for caution (Medieval Version... kind of) is next!
commercial_text: Welcome to That Pirate Bot DJ Radio, where you never hear an actual pirate scream!
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: No time for caution (Medieval Version... kind of)
